      "id": "DAY3-075",
      "author": "HelenFromLeeds",
      "text": "Has anyone verified if 'Hope for Tomorrow' is a registered charity? I received an email asking for a donation to help rebuild the community centre after the floods. The link in the message directs me to a website that looks very similar to the real one, but the contact number is different. I want to support a good cause but I'm worried about giving money to the wrong organisation.",
